__fixture__.name: duplicate_hot_set_scan_coalesced
__fixture__.scenario: A burst of file-change notifications re-enqueues knowledge.hot_set_scan three times while one scan is already in flight. The queue applies the hot_set_scan collapse_policy (coalesce_stale_duplicates); every new enqueue folds into the in-flight survivor and no running job is superseded. The lane depth does not grow. collapse_count and coalesce_count both increment by three; replace_count and restart_count are unchanged.

checkpoint_handoff.note: Coalesce does not hand off a checkpoint; the survivor folds the new enqueue into its next output cycle.

note: Three file-change notifications in 120 ms re-enqueued the same hot-set scan; the survivor job absorbed all three. Lane depth stayed at 1.
